name: 2026.13.11 (Plus 11)
body:
## SourceGit Plus v2026.13.11 (Plus 11)

**Fixes**
* Reverted the native Windows caption-role experiment that broke caption button clicks.
* Restored custom caption button release handling with the top-edge Windows fallback for maximized windows.

Download: https://github.com/kkkyloo/sourcegit_plus/releases/latest

---
Upstream: https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit/releases/tag/v2026.13
